[{"text": "Script completed\nWall time 0.3 seconds\nOutput:\n", "type": "input_text"}, {"text": "Exit code: 0\nWall time: 0.2 seconds\nOutput:\n\"use client\";\n\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\nimport { useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\n\ntype Preview = {\n  session: { status: string; versionId: string; updatedAt: string };\n  tale: { title: string; subtitle: string | null; shortDescription: string | null };\n  chapter: { title: string } | null;\n  block: { title: string; blockType: string; configuration: Record<string, unknown> } | null;\n  assets: Array<{ id: string; displayName: string }>;\n  events: Array<{ sequence: number; eventType: string }>;\n};\n\nexport function PlayerSafePreview({ playthroughId }: { playthroughId: string }) {\n  const [preview, setPreview] = useState<Preview | null>(null);\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n  useEffect(() => {\n    void fetch(`/api/captain/playthroughs/${playthroughId}/preview`, { cache: \"no-store\" }).then(async (response) => {\n      const body = (await response.json()) as { preview?: Preview; error?: string };\n      if (!response.ok) setError(body.error ?? \"Preview unavailable.\");\n      else setPreview(body.preview ?? null);\n    });\n  }, [playthroughId]);\n  if (error)\n    return (\n      <main className=\"player-safe-preview platform-loading\">\n        <p role=\"alert\" className=\"platform-error\">\n          {error}\n        </p>\n      </main>\n    );\n  if (!preview)\n    return (\n      <main className=\"player-safe-preview platform-loading\">\n        <p role=\"status\">Projecting the Player-safe view…</p>\n      </main>\n    );\n  return (\n    <main className=\"player-safe-preview\">\n      <header>\n        <Link href=\"/captain/library\">Back to Captain&apos;s Command</Link>\n        <p className=\"eyebrow\">Non-mutating Player preview</p>\n        <h1>{preview.tale.title}</h1>\n        <p>\n          This projection uses the real Player field and asset policy. No control on this page can change live progress.\n        </p>\n      </header>\n      <section>\n        <div className=\"preview-watermark\">PREVIEW · NO LIVE MUTATIONS</div>\n        <p className=\"card-kicker\">\n          {preview.session.status.toLocaleLowerCase()} · edition {preview.session.versionId.slice(0, 12)}\n        </p>\n        <h2>{preview.chapter?.title ?? \"The voyage has not launched\"}</h2>\n        <h3>{preview.block?.title ?? \"The journal remains closed\"}</h3>\n        <p>\n          {String(\n            preview.block?.configuration.body ??\n              preview.block?.configuration.prompt ??\n              preview.tale.shortDescription ??\n              \"Awaiting Captain launch.\",\n          )}\n        </p>\n        <dl>\n          <div>\n            <dt>Returned assets</dt>\n            <dd>{preview.assets.length}</dd>\n          </div>\n          <div>\n            <dt>Player-visible events</dt>\n            <dd>{preview.events.length}</dd>\n          </div>\n          <div>\n            <dt>Last server state</dt>\n            <dd>{new Date(preview.session.updatedAt).toLocaleString()}</dd>\n          </div>\n        </dl>\n      </section>\n    </main>\n  );\n}\n\r\n\"use client\";\n\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\nimport { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\nimport { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\n\ntype Playthrough = {\n  id: string;\n  title: string;\n  subtitle: string | null;\n  voyageName: string;\n  versionLabel: string;\n  status: string;\n  state: string;\n  plannedStartAt: string | null;\n  lastSynchronizedAt: string;\n  primaryHref: string;\n  primaryLabel: string;\n  crew: Array<{ displayName: string; crewRole: string | null; status: string }>;\n  canEnter: boolean;\n  runtimeHref: string | null;\n};\n\nexport function PlayerVoyageRoom({ playthroughId }: { playthroughId: string }) {\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const [voyage, setVoyage] = useState<Playthrough | null>(null);\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n  const [connection, setConnection] = useState<\"CONNECTING\" | \"LIVE\" | \"POLLING\" | \"DISCONNECTED\">(\"CONNECTING\");\n\n  const load = useCallback(async () => {\n    const response = await fetch(`/api/player/playthroughs/${playthroughId}`, { cache: \"no-store\" });\n    const body = (await response.json()) as { playthrough?: Playthrough; error?: string };\n    if (!response.ok) return setError(body.error ?? \"This voyage is unavailable.\");\n    setVoyage(body.playthrough ?? null);\n    setError(\"\");\n  }, [playthroughId]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    queueMicrotask(() => void load());\n    const timer = setInterval(() => {\n      setConnection((value) => (value === \"LIVE\" ? value : \"POLLING\"));\n      void load();\n    }, 5000);\n    const source = new EventSource(`/api/play/sessions/${playthroughId}/events`);\n    source.onopen = () => setConnection(\"LIVE\");\n    source.addEventListener(\"progression\", () => void load());\n    source.addEventListener(\"access-revoked\", () => {\n      setConnection(\"DISCONNECTED\");\n      setError(\"Your access to this voyage was revoked.\");\n    });\n    source.onerror = () => setConnection(\"POLLING\");\n    return () => {\n      clearInterval(timer);\n      source.close();\n    };\n  }, [load, playthroughId]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (voyage?.canEnter && voyage.runtimeHref) {\n      const timer = setTimeout(() => router.push(voyage.runtimeHref!), 900);\n      return () => clearTimeout(timer);\n    }\n    if (voyage?.state === \"COMPLETED\") router.replace(`/player/playthroughs/${playthroughId}/journal`);\n  }, [playthroughId, router, voyage]);\n\n  if (error && !voyage)\n    return (\n      <main className=\"waiting-room platform-loading\">\n        <p className=\"platform-error\" role=\"alert\">\n          {error}\n        </p>\n        <Link href=\"/player/library\">Return to library</Link>\n      </main>\n    );\n  if (!voyage)\n    return (\n      <main className=\"waiting-room platform-loading\">\n        <p role=\"status\">Opening the waiting room…</p>\n      </main>\n    );\n  if (voyage.state === \"COMPLETED\") {\n    return (\n      <main className=\"waiting-room platform-loading\">\n        <p role=\"status\">Opening your completed voyage archive…</p>\n      </main>\n    );\n  }\n  return (\n    <main className=\"waiting-room\">\n      <div className=\"closed-journal\" aria-hidden=\"true\">\n        <i />\n        <b>✦</b>\n      </div>\n      <section aria-labelledby=\"waiting-title\">\n        <Link href=\"/player/library\">Back to my library</Link>\n        <p className=\"eyebrow\">{voyage.status.replaceAll(\"_\", \" \")}</p>\n        <h1 id=\"waiting-title\">{voyage.title}</h1>\n        <h2>{voyage.voyageName}</h2>\n        <p>\n          {voyage.canEnter\n            ? \"The Captain has launched the voyage. Opening your journal…\"\n            : \"Your place is secured. The journal will open only after the Captain launches the voyage.\"}\n        </p>\n        <dl>\n          <div>\n            <dt>Edition</dt>\n            <dd>{voyage.versionLabel}</dd>\n          </div>\n          <div>\n            <dt>Readiness</dt>\n            <dd>{voyage.status === \"SCHEDULED\" ? \"Scheduled\" : \"Awaiting Captain\"}</dd>\n          </div>\n          {voyage.plannedStartAt && (\n            <div>\n              <dt>Planned start</dt>\n              <dd>{new Date(voyage.plannedStartAt).toLocaleString()}</dd>\n            </div>\n          )}\n          <div>\n            <dt>Connection</dt>\n            <dd className={`connection-${connection.toLowerCase()}`}>{connection.toLocaleLowerCase()}</dd>\n          </div>\n          <div>\n            <dt>Last server confirmation</dt>\n            <dd>{new Date(voyage.lastSynchronizedAt).toLocaleTimeString()}</dd>\n          </div>\n        </dl>\n        <section className=\"crew-readiness\">\n          <h3>Crew readiness</h3>\n          <ul>\n            {voyage.crew.map((member) => (\n              <li key={`${member.displayName}-${member.crewRole}`}>\n                <span>{member.displayName}</span>\n                <small>\n                  {member.crewRole ?? \"Player\"} · {member.status.replaceAll(\"_\", \" \").toLocaleLowerCase()}\n                </small>\n              </li>\n            ))}\n          </ul>\n        </section>\n        {error && (\n          <p className=\"platform-error\" role=\"alert\">\n            {error}\n          </p>\n        )}\n        <div className=\"waiting-actions\">\n          <button onClick={() => void load()}>Reconnect and refresh</button>\n          <Link href=\"/player/library\">Leave waiting room</Link>\n        </div>\n      </section>\n    </main>\n  );\n}\n\r\n\"use client\";\n\n/* eslint-disable @next/next/no-img-element -- Published asset URLs are authorized version-bound media responses. */\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\nimport { useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\n\ntype CatalogTale = {\n  id: string;\n  slug: string;\n  title: string;\n  subtitle: string | null;\n  shortDescription: string | null;\n  coverUrl: string | null;\n  estimatedDuration: number | null;\n  playerCountMin: number;\n  playerCountMax: number;\n  version: string;\n  playerState: \"NEW\" | \"IN_PROGRESS\" | \"COMPLETED\";\n  sessionId: string | null;\n};\n\nexport function TaleCatalog() {\n  const [tales, setTales] = useState<CatalogTale[]>([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n  useEffect(() => {\n    void fetch(\"/api/tales\", { cache: \"no-store\" }).then(async (response) => {\n      const body = (await response.json()) as { tales?: CatalogTale[]; error?: string };\n      if (!response.ok) setError(body.error ?? \"The voyage catalog is unavailable.\");\n      else setTales(body.tales ?? []);\n      setLoading(false);\n    });\n  }, []);\n  return (\n    <main className=\"tale-catalog\">\n      <header>\n        <Link href=\"/\">← Harbor</Link>\n        <div>\n          <p className=\"eyebrow\">Published voyages</p>\n          <h1>Choose a Tall Tale</h1>\n          <p>Every chart below is an immutable, Captain-ready release from Tall Tale Studio.</p>\n        </div>\n        <Link href=\"/captain\">Captain controls</Link>\n      </header>\n      {loading && (\n        <p className=\"catalog-status\" role=\"status\">\n          Reading the published ledger…\n        </p>\n      )}\n      {error && (\n        <p className=\"catalog-status error\" role=\"alert\">\n          {error}\n        </p>\n      )}\n      {!loading && !tales.length && (\n        <section className=\"catalog-empty\">\n          <span>☾</span>\n          <h2>No public voyages yet</h2>\n          <p>A creator must validate and publish a public Tall Tale before it appears here.</p>\n        </section>\n      )}\n      <section className=\"catalog-grid\">\n        {tales.map((tale) => (\n          <article key={tale.id}>\n            {tale.coverUrl ? (\n              <img src={tale.coverUrl} alt=\"\" />\n            ) : (\n              <div className=\"catalog-cover-fallback\">\n                <i />✦\n              </div>\n            )}\n            <div>\n              <p className=\"card-kicker\">\n                Published version {tale.version} ·{\" \"}\n                {tale.playerState === \"IN_PROGRESS\"\n                  ? \"In progress\"\n                  : tale.playerState === \"COMPLETED\"\n                    ? \"Completed · replayable\"\n                    : \"New voyage\"}\n              </p>\n              <h2>{tale.title}</h2>\n              <h3>{tale.subtitle}</h3>\n              <p>{tale.shortDescription ?? \"A new voyage awaits beyond the harbor lights.\"}</p>\n              <dl>\n                <div>\n                  <dt>Duration</dt>\n                  <dd>{tale.estimatedDuration ? `${tale.estimatedDuration} min` : \"Uncharted\"}</dd>\n                </div>\n                <div>\n                  <dt>Crew</dt>\n                  <dd>\n                    {tale.playerCountMin}–{tale.playerCountMax}\n                  </dd>\n                </div>\n              </dl>\n              <Link\n                className=\"brass-button\"\n                href={\n                  tale.playerState === \"IN_PROGRESS\" && tale.sessionId\n                    ? `/play/${tale.slug}/session/${tale.sessionId}`\n                    : `/play/${tale.slug}`\n                }\n              >\n                {tale.playerState === \"IN_PROGRESS\"\n                  ? \"Continue voyage\"\n                  : tale.playerState === \"COMPLETED\"\n                    ? \"Replay voyage\"\n                    : \"Start voyage\"}\n              </Link>\n            </div>\n          </article>\n        ))}\n      </section>\n    </main>\n  );\n}\n\r\n\"use client\";\n\n/* eslint-disable @next/next/no-img-element -- Published asset URLs are authorized version-bound media responses. */\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\nimport { useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\nimport { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\n\ntype Tale = {\n  slug: string;\n  title: string;\n  subtitle: string | null;\n  shortDescription: string | null;\n  longDescription: string | null;\n  coverUrl: string | null;\n  estimatedDuration: number | null;\n  playerCountMin: number;\n  playerCountMax: number;\n  contentWarnings: string | null;\n  version: string;\n};\n\nexport function TaleStart({ taleSlug }: { taleSlug: string }) {\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const [tale, setTale] = useState<Tale | null>(null);\n  const [label, setLabel] = useState(\"\");\n  const [busy, setBusy] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n  useEffect(() => {\n    void fetch(`/api/tales/${taleSlug}`, { cache: \"no-store\" }).then(async (response) => {\n      const body = (await response.json()) as { tale?: Tale; error?: string };\n      if (!response.ok) setError(body.error ?? \"This chart cannot be opened.\");\n      else setTale(body.tale ?? null);\n    });\n  }, [taleSlug]);\n  if (error)\n    return (\n      <main className=\"tale-start error\">\n        <section>\n          <h1>Chart unavailable</h1>\n          <p>{error}</p>\n          <Link href=\"/tales\">Return to the catalog</Link>\n        </section>\n      </main>\n    );\n  if (!tale)\n    return (\n      <main className=\"tale-start\">\n        <p role=\"status\">Unrolling the published chart…</p>\n      </main>\n    );\n  return (\n    <main className=\"tale-start\">\n      {tale.coverUrl && <img className=\"tale-start-cover\" src={tale.coverUrl} alt=\"\" />}\n      <div className=\"tale-start-shade\" />\n      <section>\n        <Link href=\"/tales\">← Published tales</Link>\n        <p className=\"eyebrow\">\n          Version {tale.version} · {tale.estimatedDuration ? `${tale.estimatedDuration} minutes` : \"duration uncharted\"}\n        </p>\n        <h1>{tale.title}</h1>\n        <h2>{tale.subtitle}</h2>\n        <p>{tale.longDescription ?? tale.shortDescription}</p>\n        <dl>\n          <div>\n            <dt>Crew</dt>\n            <dd>\n              {tale.playerCountMin}–{tale.playerCountMax} players\n            </dd>\n          </div>\n          {tale.contentWarnings && (\n            <div>\n              <dt>Notes</dt>\n              <dd>{tale.contentWarnings}</dd>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </dl>\n        <form\n          onSubmit={async (event) => {\n            event.preventDefault();\n            setBusy(true);\n            setError(\"\");\n            const response = await fetch(`/api/tales/${taleSlug}/start`, {\n              method: \"POST\",\n              headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n              body: JSON.stringify({ ownerLabel: label }),\n            });\n            const body = (await response.json()) as { url?: string; error?: string };\n            if (!response.ok || !body.url) {\n              setError(body.error ?? \"The voyage could not begin.\");\n              setBusy(false);\n              return;\n            }\n            router.push(body.url);\n          }}\n        >\n          <label>\n            <span>Crew or player name</span>\n            <input\n              value={label}\n              onChange={(event) => setLabel(event.target.value)}\n              placeholder=\"Guest crew\"\n              maxLength={120}\n            />\n          </label>\n          <button className=\"brass-button\" disabled={busy}>\n            {busy ? \"Preparing the session…\" : \"Begin this Tall Tale\"}\n          </button>\n          {error && <p role=\"alert\">{error}</p>}\n        </form>\n      </section>\n    </main>\n  );\n}\n\r\n", "type": "input_text"}]

 );\n  if (!library)\n    return (\n      <main className=\"player-library platform-loading\">\n        <p role=\"status\">Reading your voyage shelf…</p>\n      </main>\n    );\n\n  return (\n PlayerTaleCard({\n  card,\n  onPreference,\n}: {\n  card: Card;\n  onPreference: (card: Card, action: \"pin\" | \"unpin\" | \"hide\") => void;\n}) {\n  return (\n    <article className={`player-tale-card state-${card.state.toLocaleLowerCase()}`}>\n      <div className=\"tale-cover\">\n        {card.coverUrl ? <img src={card.coverUrl} alt=\"\" /> : <span aria-hidden=\"true\">✦</span>}\n        <b>{card.status.replaceAll(\"_\", \" \")}</b>\n      </div>\n      <div className=\"tale-card-copy\">\n        <p className=\"card-kicker\">\n          Version {card.versionLabel} · {card.voyageName}\n          {card.pinned ? \" · Pinned\" : \"\"}\n        </p>\n        <h3>{card.title}</h3>\n        {card.subtitle && <h4>{card.subtitle}</h4>}\n        <p>{card.shortDescription ?? \"A Tall Tale waits inside this volume.\"}</p>\n        <dl>\n          <div>\n            <dt>Captain</dt>\n            <dd>{card.captainName}</dd>\n          </div>\n          {card.currentChapterTitle && (\n            <div>\n              <dt>Present chapter</dt>\n              <dd>{card.currentChapterTitle}</dd>\n            </div>\n          )}\n          {card.revealedChapterCount > 0 && (\n            <div>\n              <dt>Revealed chapters</dt>\n              <dd>{card.revealedChapterCount}</dd>\n            </div>\n          )}\n          {card.completionDate && (\n            <div>\n              <dt>Completed</dt>\n              <dd>{new Date(card.completionDate).toLocaleDateString()}</dd>\n            </div>\n          )}\n          {card.completionDate && (\n            <div>\n              <dt>Memories</dt>\n              <dd>{card.memoriesCollected}</dd>\n            </div>\n          )}\n          {card.plannedStartAt && (\n            <div>\n              <dt>Planned start</dt>\n              <dd>{new Date(card.plannedStartAt).toLocaleString()}</dd>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </dl>\n        <div className=\"card-actions\">\n          <Link className=\"brass-button\" href={card.primaryHref}>\n            {card.primaryLabel}\n          </Link>\n          <button onClick={() => onPreference(card, card.pinned ? \"unpin\" : \"pin\")}>\n            {card.pinned ? \"Unpin\" : \"Pin to top\"}\n          </button>\n          {[\"COMPLETED\", \"EXPIRED_REVOKED\"].includes(card.state) && (\n            <button onClick={() => onPreference(card, \"hide\")}>Hide from library</button>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </article>\n  );\n}\n\r\n\"use client\";\n\n/* eslint-disable @next/next/no-img-element -- Cover image is authorized against the pending invitation cookie. */\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\nimport { useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\nimport { useRouter, useSearchParams } from \"next/navigation\";\n\ntype Invitation = {\n  id: string;\n  status: string;\n  recipientName: string;\n  expiresAt: string;\n  requiresPin: boolean;\n  playthrough: {\n    id: string;\n    voyageName: string;\n    status: string;\n    plannedStartAt: string | null;\n    scheduleTimezone: string | null;\n    versionLabel: string | null;\n    tale: { title: string; subtitle: string | null; shortDescription: string | null; coverUrl: string | null } | null;\n  };\n};\n\nexport function InvitationCeremony() {\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const search = useSearchParams();\n  const [invitation, setInvitation] = useState<Invitation | null>(null);\n  const [csrf, setCsrf] = useState(\"\");\n  const [pin, setPin] = useState(\"\");\n  const [displayName, setDisplayName] = useState(\"\");\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\n    search.get(\"state\") === \"invalid\" ? \"This invitation is invalid or no longer available.\" : \"\",\n  );\n  const [needsAccount, setNeedsAccount] = useState(false);\n  const [busy, setBusy] = useState(false);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (search.get(\"state\") === \"invalid\") return;\n    void fetch(\"/api/invitations/resolve\", { cache: \"no-store\" }).then(async (response) => {\n      const body = (await response.json()) as { invitation?: Invitation; csrfToken?: string; error?: string };\n      if (!response.ok) return setError(body.error ?? \"This invitation is not available.\");\n      setInvitation(body.invitation ?? null);\n      setCsrf(body.csrfToken ?? \"\");\n      setDisplayName(body.invitation?.recipientName ?? \"\");\n    });\n  }, [search]);\n\n  async function act(action: \"accept\" | \"decline\") {\n    setBusy(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    const response = await fetch(`/api/invitations/${action}`, {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", \"x-csrf-token\": csrf },\n      body: JSON.stringify(action === \"accept\" ? { pin, displayName } : {}),\n    });\n    const body = (await response.json()) as { error?: string; code?: string; playthroughId?: string };\n    setBusy(false);\n    if (!response.ok) {\n      setNeedsAccount(body.code === \"ACCOUNT_REQUIRED\");\n      return setError(body.error ?? `Unable to ${action} this invitation.`);\n    }\n    router.push(action === \"accept\" ? `/player/playthroughs/${body.playthroughId}` : \"/player/sign-in\");\n    router.refresh();\n  }\n\n  if (error && !invitation)\n    return (\n      <main className=\"invitation-page\">\n        <section className=\"invitation-sheet invalid\">\n          <p className=\"eyebrow\">Invitation closed</p>\n          <h1>The seal will not open</h1>\n          <p role=\"alert\">{error}</p>\n          <Link href=\"/player/sign-in\">Return to Player entry</Link>\n        </section>\n      </main>\n    );\n  if (!invitation)\n    return (\n      <main className=\"invitation-page platform-loading\">\n        <p role=\"status\">Inspecting the Captain&apos;s seal…</p>\n      </main>\n    );\n  const tale = invitation.playthrough.tale;\n  return (\n    <main className=\"invitation-page\">\n      <section className=\"invitation-sheet\" aria-labelledby=\"invitation-title\">\n        <div className=\"invitation-seal\" aria-hidden=\"true\">\n          ✦\n        </div>\n        {tale?.coverUrl && <img className=\"invitation-cover\" src={tale.coverUrl} alt=\"\" />}\n        <p className=\"eyebrow\">A Captain&apos;s invitation for {invitation.recipientName}</p>\n        <h1 id=\"invitation-title\">{tale?.title ?? \"A Tall Tale awaits\"}</h1>\n        <h2>{invitation.playthrough.voyageName}</h2>\n        <p>{tale?.shortDescription ?? \"Your voyage is ready to join.\"}</p>\n        <dl>\n          <div>\n            <dt>Edition</dt>\n            <dd>{invitation.playthrough.versionLabel}</dd>\n          </div>\n          <div>\n            <dt>Invitation expires</dt>\n            <dd>{new Date(invitation.expiresAt).toLocaleString()}</dd>\n          </div>\n          {invitation.playthrough.plannedStartAt && (\n            <div>\n              <dt>Planned start</dt>\n              <dd>\n                {new Date(invitation.playthrough.plannedStartAt).toLocaleString()}{\" \"}\n                {invitation.playthrough.scheduleTimezone}\n              </dd>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </dl>\n        <label>\n          <span>Your display name</span>\n          <input value={displayName} onChange={(event) => setDisplayName(event.target.value)} required />\n        </label>\n        {invitation.requiresPin && (\n          <label>\n            <span>Invitation PIN</span>\n            <input\n              type=\"password\"\n              inputMode=\"numeric\"\n              autoComplete=\"one-time-code\"\n              value={pin}\n              onChange={(event) => setPin(event.target.value)}\n              required\n            />\n          </label>\n        )}\n        {error && (\n          <p className=\"platform-error\" role=\"alert\">\n            {error}\n          </p>\n        )}\n        {needsAccount && (\n          <Link className=\"brass-button\" href=\"/player/sign-in\">\n            Sign in, then return to this invitation\n          </Link>\n        )}\n        <div className=\"invitation-actions\">\n          <button\n            className=\"brass-button\"\n            disabled={busy || !displayName || (invitation.requiresPin && !pin)}\n            onClick={() => void act(\"accept\")}\n          >\n            Accept and join voyage\n          </button>\n          <button disabled={busy} onClick={() => void act(\"decline\")}>\n            Decline invitation\n          </button>\n        </div>\n      </section>\n    </main>\n  );\n}\n\r\n", "type": "input_text"}]

## Assistant
**Timestamp:** 2026-07-18T15:19:57.083Z

The live UI review confirms the code findings. The visual language is attractive and the core flows work, but users lose orientation after entering a workspace; every major route has the same document title; the Player empty library still presents inactive search controls; selected view/tab controls do not expose `aria-pressed`; disabled contrast is poor on parchment; Captain and Studio cards are overly narrow on desktop; and loading states are mostly text-only with false-empty flashes in Studio. I’m checking the narrow breakpoints now, then I’ll implement the shared shell, state primitives, token aliases, and route-specific fixes together.

## Assistant
**Timestamp:** 2026-07-18T15:20:14.836Z

Narrow-screen review found no document-level horizontal overflow at 390 px, but it exposed two important polish defects: the landing presentation controls overlap role actions while the entrance scene is playing, and Captain’s horizontally scrolling section tabs use a persistent scrollbar as primary navigation. I’m recording the governing terminology and implementation checklist in `Development_Docs` now, then moving into the shared foundation edits.

**Timestamp:** 2026-07-18T15:21:00.517Z

const patch = "*** Begin Patch\n*** Add File: C:\\Users\\kkids\\Documents\\Codex_TreasureHunt\\Development_Docs\\Full_System_Product_Polish_Implementation_Record.md\n+# Full-System Product Polish implementation record\n+\n+Status: implementation in progress  \n+Started: 2026-07-18  \n+Repository baseline: `main` at `481dc92`, synchronized with `origin/main` (`0` behind / `0` ahead)\n+\n+## Governing boundaries\n+\n+- Preserve the unified Tall Tale platform, immutable published versions, role/resource policy, Player-safe projections, audited Captain operations, and canonical journal runtime.\n+- The library helps a Player choose or continue an adventure; the physical journal remains the canonical place where a Tall Tale is played.\n+- The Phase B Vision Waypoint roadmap and governing specification are parallel future-program inputs. This polish pass must remain compatible with their shared-product and design-system rules, but it must not invent capture, vision, PWA, or desktop behavior.\n+- System copy stays broadly reusable. Authored Tall Tale copy may be specific to its selected story or event.\n+- Existing local changes and untracked governing documents are preserved without normalization or incidental edits.\n+\n+## Product terminology map\n+\n+| Term | Product meaning | Usage rule |\n+| --- | --- | --- |\n+| Tall Tale | A reusable, creator-authored interactive story | Primary noun for content in discovery, Studio, and invitations |\n+| Experience | Broad description of what participants create or join | Use in explanatory marketing copy; do not substitute it for stored Tall Tale entities |\n+| Voyage | A configured, version-pinned playthrough shared by a group | Use for Captain setup, invitations, lobby, history, and continuation |\n+| Session | The live technical/runtime state of a voyage | Use for operational status, reconnect behavior, and Captain controls |\n+| Player | A person experiencing the Tall Tale | Primary participant role in controls and permissions |\n+| Participant | Inclusive collective label when role detail is not important | Use in general explanations and accessibility copy |\n+| Captain | The host who configures and guides a voyage | Use consistently for host-only actions |\n+| Creator | A person who authors and publishes Tall Tales | Use consistently for Studio access and authoring actions |\n+| Crew | Optional thematic collective for Players | Flavor only; critical controls continue to use Player or participant |\n+| Chapter | A published structural division of a Tall Tale | Never substitute step or stage for the authored chapter entity |\n+| Story moment | A prompt, passage, decision, activity, or reveal inside a chapter | Human-readable umbrella term for block-level content |\n+| Invitation | A single-recipient credential and joining flow | Use for links, short codes, PINs, lifecycle, and acceptance |\n+| Waiting room | The pre-launch Player state after invitation acceptance | Use instead of lobby where the existing route and domain already use this term |\n+| Journal | The immersive, canonical in-session and completed-history surface | Cards may select a voyage, but must not replace journal play |\n+\n+## Audit summary\n+\n+### Architecture and data\n+\n+- Next.js 16 App Router with React 19, strict TypeScript, Prisma, server-owned authorization/projections, ordered events, SSE reconciliation, GSAP/Motion/StPageFlip/Rive/Lottie presentation, Vitest, and Playwright.\n+- Public, Player, Captain, Creator, legacy campaign companion, and development showcase route families are additive and share the same repository, but their page chrome and navigation are currently local implementations.\n+- The unified platform and canonical journal are already release-gate validated. Polish work should reuse their services rather than create visual-only copies of data.\n+- Baseline quality gates pass: Prettier, ESLint, TypeScript, and 90 Vitest tests across 27 files.\n+\n+### Product and visual findings\n+\n+- Landing, platform, Studio, Tall Tale, legacy Player, Quartermaster, and animation surfaces use related materials but do not yet share one explicit product shell.\n+- Page metadata is global, so major routes expose the same title and private-one-tale description.\n+- `tokens.css` defines the original palette and a few primitives, while surface styles duplicate semantic colors, radii, timings, shadows, and layer numbers.\n+- Buttons, form fields, selected controls, alerts, loading states, and empty states are styled through several local patterns. Disabled contrast is poor on parchment surfaces.\n+- Captain and Studio cards remain narrow on large screens and leave substantial unused workspace.\n+- Studio briefly renders a false empty state while its library request is still pending.\n+- Player Library shows search/filter/view controls even when the account has no voyages.\n+- Tab and gallery/list selection is visual but not consistently exposed with `aria-pressed` or `aria-current`.\n+- Loading states are mostly single lines of text rather than stable skeletons; several failure states lack an in-place retry.\n+- The landing entrance controls can overlap role actions on a small mobile viewport while the scene is playing.\n+- Route titles, return paths, and workspace switching are inconsistent; authenticated users can reach a route but cannot always answer where they are or how to switch context.\n+\n+### Content findings\n+\n+- General interface copy is already predominantly reusable and non-romantic.\n+- Development fixture names and the product title appear in authored/demo data, correctly separated from system copy.\n+- Operational terms are sometimes exposed where action-oriented wording would be clearer (for example, immutable/version language in discovery introductions).\n+- Primary nouns are mostly stable, but controls alternate between catalog/library, start/begin, host/Captain implications, and technical session/voyage language without an explicit map.\n+\n+## Implementation checklist\n+\n+### Shared foundation\n+\n+- [ ] Add a responsive shared product shell with skip navigation, active workspace state, mobile navigation, role switching, and restrained footer/help context.\n+- [ ] Add route-family metadata and replace the one-tale global description with reusable product language.\n+- [ ] Expand semantic design, motion, typography, control, state, and layer tokens without replacing the established palette.\n+- [ ] Add shared loading, error, empty, status, and action primitives.\n+- [ ] Standardize primary, secondary, subtle, and destructive action states, including readable disabled and loading behavior.\n+\n+### Public and onboarding\n+\n+- [ ] Explain what a Tall Tale is, how hosting/joining differs, supported experience categories, persistence, and privacy/control on the landing page.\n+- [ ] Add clear `Explore Tall Tales`, `Join with an invitation`, and role-specific calls to action.\n+- [ ] Prevent mobile presentation controls from covering meaningful content.\n+\n+### Discovery and setup\n+\n+- [ ] Add search/filter/clear behavior and richer consistent card semantics to public discovery using real catalog data.\n+- [ ] Make loading, no-results, empty-catalog, and error recovery states intentional.\n+- [ ] Improve the Captain creation wizard's progress semantics, selected states, validation messages, review summary, action labels, and success feedback.\n+\n+### Player, invitations, and waiting room\n+\n+- [ ] Prioritize active/invited content over filters; hide irrelevant tools for a truly empty library.\n+- [ ] Add accessible selected-state semantics and inline save/loading feedback for preferences.\n+- [ ] Clarify invitation validity, account requirement, joining, decline consequence, and busy/success states.\n+- [ ] Keep connection, Captain-waiting, reconnect, leave, and automatic journal-entry states distinguishable.\n+\n+### Captain and Creator\n+\n+- [ ] Use the shared shell while preserving capability checks and audited mutations.\n+- [ ] Improve responsive card density, destructive-action language, server status, loading, error recovery, and empty-state next actions.\n+- [ ] Remove Studio's false-empty flash and expose busy action labels.\n+\n+### Canonical journal\n+\n+- [ ] Preserve the physical journal as the dominant in-session surface.\n+- [ ] Confirm contextual tools, return-to-library/current-objective actions, reconnect messaging, text scaling, and reduced-motion behavior remain intact after shared changes.\n+\n+### Accessibility, responsive behavior, and quality\n+\n+- [ ] Add visible active navigation, skip target, keyboard-safe mobile menu, polite status regions, `aria-busy`, `aria-pressed`, and named destructive controls.\n+- [ ] Verify 390x844, 430x932, 844x390, 1440x900, 1920x1080, and 2560x1440 representative layouts without horizontal overflow.\n+- [ ] Run formatter, linter, strict types, unit tests, configured browser tests, asset validation, and production build.\n+- [ ] Manually review public, Player, Captain, Creator, invitation/waiting, and journal routes with console inspection.\n+\n+## Deferred by governing scope\n+\n+- Production/private story and media replacement while the repository is public.\n+- MySQL 8 live integration, shared pub/sub/rate limiting, object storage, background scheduled launch, and production deployment.\n+- Phase B native capture, Vision Waypoints, verification engine, PWA, desktop shell, packaging, and updater work.\n*** End Patch";
text(await tools.apply_patch(patch));

pathname.startsWith(`${route}/`);\n+}\n+\n+export function ProductShell({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {\n+  const pathname = usePathname();\n+  const [menuOpen, setMenuOpen] = {tale.playerState === \"IN_PROGRESS\"\r\n                  ? \"Resume Story\"\r\n                  : tale.playerState === \"COMPLETED\"\r\n                    ? \"Replay Tall Tale\"\r\n                    : \"Preview Tall Tale\"}\r\n              </Link>\r\n            </div>\r\n          </article>\r\n        ))}\r\n      </section>\r\n    </main>\r\n  );\r\n}\r\n\"use client\";\r\n\r\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\r\nimport { usePathname } from \"next/navigation\";\r\nimport { useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\r\n\r\ntype Workspace = \"public\" | \"player\" | \"captain\" | \"creator\";\r\n\r\ntype ShellDefinition = {\r\n  workspace: Workspace;\r\n  label: string;\r\n  navigation: Array<{ href: string; label: string; exact?: boolean }>;\r\n};\r\n\r\nconst shellDefinitions: Record<Workspace, ShellDefinition> = {\r\n  public: {\r\n    workspace: \"public\",\r\n    label: \"Tall Tale Harbor\",\r\n    navigation: [\r\n      { href: \"/tales\", label: \"Explore Tall Tales\", exact: true },\r\n      { href: \"/player\", label: \"Player Library\" },\r\n      { href: \"/captain\", label: \"Host a Voyage\" },\r\n      { href: \"/studio\", label: \"Create\" },\r\n    ],\r\n  },\r\n  player: {\r\n    workspace: \"player\",\r\n    label: \"Player Waters\",\r\n    navigation: [\r\n      { href: \"/player/library\", label: \"My Library\" },\r\n      { href: \"/tales\", label: \"Explore Tall Tales\", exact: true },\r\n      { href: \"/player/sign-in#invitation-code\", label: \"Join with a Code\" },\r\n      { href: \"/\", label: \"Switch Role\", exact: true },\r\n    ],\r\n  },\r\n  captain: {\r\n    workspace: \"captain\",\r\n    label: \"Captain's Command\",\r\n    navigation: [\r\n      { href: \"/captain/library\", label: \"Voyages\" },\r\n      { href: \"/captain/invitations\", label: \"Invitations\" },\r\n      { href: \"/tales\", label: \"Explore Tall Tales\", exact: true },\r\n      { href: \"/studio/library\", label: \"Creator Workspace\" },\r\n    ],\r\n  },\r\n  creator: {\r\n    workspace: \"creator\",\r\n    label: \"Tall Tale Studio\",\r\n    navigation: [\r\n      { href: \"/studio/library\", label: \"Studio Library\" },\r\n      { href: \"/studio/tales/new\", label: \"New Tall Tale\" },\r\n      { href: \"/tales\", label: \"Player Preview\", exact: true },\r\n      { href: \"/captain/library\", label: \"Captain Workspace\" },\r\n    ],\r\n  },\r\n};\r\n\r\nfunction getWorkspace(pathname: string): Workspace {\r\n  if (pathname.startsWith(\"/player\")) return \"player\";\r\n  if (pathname.startsWith(\"/captain\")) return \"captain\";\r\n  if (pathname.startsWith(\"/studio\")) return \"creator\";\r\n  return \"public\";\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction isImmersiveRoute(pathname: string) {\r\n  return (\r\n    pathname === \"/\" ||\r\n    pathname.startsWith(\"/dev/\") ||\r\n    pathname.startsWith(\"/quartermaster\") ||\r\n    pathname.startsWith(\"/tale/\") ||\r\n    /^\\/play\\/[^/]+\\/session\\/[^/]+/.test(pathname) ||\r\n    /^\\/player\\/playthroughs\\/[^/]+\\/journal/.test(pathname)\r\n  );\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction isCurrent(pathname: string, href: string, exact?: boolean) {\r\n  const route = href.split(\"#\")[0];\r\n  if (exact) return pathname === route;\r\n  return pathname === route || pathname.startsWith(`${route}/`);\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function ProductShell({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {\r\n  const pathname = usePathname();\r\n  const [menuOpen, setMenuOpen] = useState(false);\r\n\r\n  useEffect(() => {\r\n    queueMicrotask(() => setMenuOpen(false));\r\n  }, [pathname]);\r\n  useEffect(() => {\r\n    if (!menuOpen) return;\r\n    const close = (event: KeyboardEvent) => {\r\n      if (event.key === \"Escape\") setMenuOpen(false);\r\n    };\r\n    window.addEventListener(\"keydown\", close);\r\n    return () => window.removeEventListener(\"keydown\", close);\r\n  }, [menuOpen]);\r\n\r\n  if (isImmersiveRoute(pathname)) return children;\r\n\r\n  const definition = shellDefinitions[getWorkspace(pathname)];\r\n  return (\r\n    <div className={`product-shell workspace-${definition.workspace}`}>\r\n      <a className=\"skip-link\" href=\"#main-content\">\r\n        Skip to main content\r\n      </a>\r\n      <header className=\"product-shell-header\">\r\n        <Link className=\"product-mark\" href=\"/\" aria-label=\"Forever Treasure role gateway\">\r\n          <span aria-hidden=\"true\">âœ¦</span>\r\n          <span>\r\n            <strong>Forever Treasure</strong>\r\n            <small>{definition.label}</small>\r\n          </span>\r\n        </Link>\r\n        <button\r\n          className=\"product-menu-button\"\r\n          type=\"button\"\r\n          aria-expanded={menuOpen}\r\n          aria-controls=\"product-navigation\"\r\n          onClick={() => setMenuOpen((current) => !current)}\r\n        >\r\n          <span aria-hidden=\"true\">{menuOpen ? \"Ã—\" : \"â˜°\"}</span>\r\n          <span>{menuOpen ? \"Close\" : \"Menu\"}</span>\r\n        </button>\r\n        <nav id=\"product-navigation\" className=\"product-navigation\" aria-label={`${definition.label} navigation`}>\r\n          {definition.navigation.map((item) => {\r\n            const current = isCurrent(pathname, item.href, item.exact);\r\n            return (\r\n              <Link key={item.href} href={item.href} aria-current={current ? \"page\" : undefined}>\r\n                {item.label}\r\n              </Link>\r\n            );\r\n          })}\r\n        </nav>\r\n        {menuOpen && (\r\n          <button\r\n            className=\"product-menu-backdrop\"\r\n            type=\"button\"\r\n            aria-label=\"Close navigation menu\"\r\n            onClick={() => setMenuOpen(false)}\r\n          />\r\n        )}\r\n      </header>\r\n      <div className=\"product-shell-content\" id=\"main-content\" tabIndex={-1}>\r\n        {children}\r\n      </div>\r\n      <footer className=\"product-footer\">\r\n        <p>Interactive Tall Tales for friends, families, groups, and celebrations.</p>\r\n        <nav aria-label=\"Product links\">\r\n          <Link href=\"/\">Role gateway</Link>\r\n          <Link href=\"/tales\">Explore Tall Tales</Link>\r\n        </nav>\r\n      </footer>\r\n    </div>\r\n  );\r\n}\r\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\r\n\r\ntype StateAction =\r\n  | { label: string; href: string; onClick?: never }\r\n  | { label: string; onClick: () => void; href?: never };\r\n\r\nfunction StateActionControl({ action }: { action: StateAction }) {\r\n  if (action.href)\r\n    return (\r\n      <Link className=\"brass-button\" href={action.href}>\r\n        {action.label}\r\n      </Link>\r\n    );\r\n  return (\r\n    <button className=\"brass-button\" type=\"button\" onClick={action.onClick}>\r\n      {action.label}\r\n    </button>\r\n  );\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function LoadingState({\r\n  title,\r\n  detail,\r\n  compact = false,\r\n}: {\r\n  title: string;\r\n  detail?: string;\r\n  compact?: boolean;\r\n}) {\r\n  return (\r\n    <section className={`ui-state ui-loading-state ${compact ? \"compact\" : \"\"}`} role=\"status\" aria-live=\"polite\">\r\n      <span className=\"ui-spinner\" aria-hidden=\"true\" />\r\n      <div>\r\n        <h2>{title}</h2>\r\n        {detail && <p>{detail}</p>}\r\n      </div>\r\n      <div className=\"ui-skeleton-lines\" aria-hidden=\"true\">\r\n        <i />\r\n        <i />\r\n        <i />\r\n      </div>\r\n    </section>\r\n  );\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function ErrorState({ title, detail, action }: { title: string; detail: string; action?: StateAction }) {\r\n  return (\r\n    <section className=\"ui-state ui-error-state\" role=\"alert\">\r\n      <span className=\"ui-state-symbol\" aria-hidden=\"true\">\r\n        !\r\n      </span>\r\n      <div>\r\n        <p className=\"eyebrow\">Unable to continue</p>\r\n        <h2>{title}</h2>\r\n        <p>{detail}</p>\r\n      </div>\r\n      {action && <StateActionControl action={action} />}\r\n    </section>\r\n  );\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function EmptyState({\r\n  title,\r\n  detail,\r\n  action,\r\n  symbol = \"âœ¦\",\r\n}: {\r\n  title: string;\r\n  detail: string;\r\n  action?: StateAction;\r\n  symbol?: string;\r\n}) {\r\n  return (\r\n    <section className=\"ui-state ui-empty-state\">\r\n      <span className=\"ui-state-symbol\" aria-hidden=\"true\">\r\n        {symbol}\r\n      </span>\r\n      <div>\r\n        <h2>{title}</h2>\r\n        <p>{detail}</p>\r\n      </div>\r\n      {action && <StateActionControl action={action} />}\r\n    </section>\r\n  );\r\n}\r\n\r\nexport function StatusBanner({\r\n  children,\r\n  tone = \"info\",\r\n}: {\r\n  children: React.ReactNode;\r\n  tone?: \"info\" | \"success\" | \"warning\" | \"danger\";\r\n}) {\r\n  return (\r\n    <p className={`ui-status-banner tone-${tone}`} role={tone === \"danger\" ? \"alert\" : \"status\"}>\r\n      <span aria-hidden=\"true\" />\r\n      {children}\r\n    </p>\r\n  );\r\n}\r\n\"use client\";\r\n\r\n/* eslint-disable @next/next/no-img-element -- QR data URLs are generated server-side and shown only after invitation creation. */\r\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\r\nimport { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from \"react\";\r\nimport { EmptyState, ErrorState, LoadingState, StatusBanner } from \"@/components/ui/AsyncState\";\r\n\r\ntype Voyage = {\r\n  id: string;\r\n  taleTitle: string;\r\n  voyageName: string;\r\n  versionLabel: string;\r\n  status: string;\r\n  plannedStartAt: string | null;\r\n  lastActivityAt: string;\r\n  currentSequence: number;\r\n  connected: boolean;\r\n  pendingAction: string | null;\r\n  players: Array<{ id: string; displayName: string; status: string }>;\r\n};\r\ntype Invitation = {\r\n  id: string;\r\n  playthroughId: string;\r\n  taleTitle: string;\r\n  voyageName: string | null;\r\n  versionLabel: string | null;\r\n  recipientName: string;\r\n  status: string;\r\n  tokenPrefix: string;\r\n  shortCodePrefix: string;\r\n  expiresAt: string;\r\n  viewedAt: string | null;\r\n  acceptedAt: string | null;\r\n  replacementId: string | null;\r\n};\r\ntype Tale = {\r\n  id: string;\r\n  title: string;\r\n  subtitle: string | null;\r\n  visibility: string;\r\n  versions: Array<{ id: string; label: string; publishedAt: string; activeRunCount: number }>;\r\n};\r\ntype Library = {\r\n  csrfToken: string;\r\n  groups: {\r\n    needsAttention: Voyage[];\r\n    activeVoyages: Voyage[];\r\n    readyToLaunch: Voyage[];\r\n    completedPlaythroughs: Voyage[];\r\n  };\r\n  invitations: Invitation[];\r\n  publishedTales: Tale[];\r\n  playerProfiles: Array<{ id: string; displayName: string; username: string | null }>;\r\n  serverTime: string;\r\n};\r\ntype CreatedInvitation = {\r\n  id: string;\r\n  recipientName: string;\r\n  link: string;\r\n  shortCode: string;\r\n  qrCodeDataUrl: string;\r\n  message: string;\r\n  expiresAt: string;\r\n};\r\ntype CrewDraft = { key: string; playerId: string; displayName: string; crewRole: string; pin: string };\r\n\r\nconst steps = [\"Select Tale\", \"Configure Voyage\", \"Add Players\", \"Security\", \"Delivery\", \"Review\", \"Create\"];\r\n\r\nexport function CaptainLibrary() {\r\n  const [library, setLibrary] = useState<Library | null>(null);\r\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\r\n  const [tab, setTab] = useState<\"voyages\" | \"invitations\" | \"published\">(\"voyages\");\r\n  const [wizard, setWizard] = useState(false);\r\n  const [step, setStep] = useState(0);\r\n  const [taleId, setTaleId] = useState(\"\");\r\n  const [versionId, setVersionId] = useState(\"\");\r\n  const [voyageName, setVoyageName] = useState(\"\");\r\n  const [captainMode, setCaptainMode] = useState(\"CAPTAIN_CONTROLLED\");\r\n  const [hints, setHints] = useState(\"ON_REQUEST\");\r\n  const [sideQuests, setSideQuests] = useState(true);\r\n  const [plannedStartAt, setPlannedStartAt] = useState(\"\");\r\n  const [scheduleTimezone, setScheduleTimezone] = useState(Intl.DateTimeFormat().resolvedOptions().timeZone);\r\n  const [players, setPlayers] = useState<CrewDraft[]>([\r\n    { key: \"crew-1\", playerId: \"\", displayName: \"\", crewRole: \"Player\", pin: \"\" },\r\n  ]);\r\n  const [expiresInHours, setExpiresInHours] = useState(168);\r\n  const [accountRequired, setAccountRequired] = useState(false);\r\n  const [created, setCreated] = useState<CreatedInvitation[]>([]);\r\n  const [busy, setBusy] = useState(false);\r\n  const [notice, setNotice] = useState(\"\");\r\n\r\n  const load = useCallback(async () => {\r\n    const response = await fetch(\"/api/captain/library\", { cache: \"no-store\" });\r\n    const body = (await response.json()) as Library & { error?: string };\r\n    if (!response.ok) setError(body.error ?? \"Captain's library is unavailable.\");\r\n    else {\r\n      setLibrary(body);\r\n      setError(\"\");\r\n    }\r\n  }, []);\r\n  useEffect(() => {\r\n    if (new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get(\"tab\") === \"invitations\")\r\n      queueMicrotask(() => setTab(\"invitations\"));\r\n    queueMicrotask(() => void load());\r\n    co…24 tokens truncated…itationAction(invitation: Invitation, action: \"extend\" | \"revoke\" | \"replace\") {\r\n    if (!library) return;\r\n    if (\r\n      [\"revoke\", \"replace\"].includes(action) &&\r\n      !window.confirm(\r\n        action === \"revoke\"\r\n          ? `Revoke the invitation for ${invitation.recipientName}? The current link and short code will stop working.`\r\n          : `Replace the invitation for ${invitation.recipientName}? The current link and short code will be revoked and new credentials created.`,\r\n      )\r\n    )\r\n      return;\r\n    setBusy(true);\r\n    setError(\"\");\r\n    setNotice(\"\");\r\n    const response = await fetch(`/api/captain/invitations/${invitation.id}`, {\r\n      method: \"POST\",\r\n      headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\", \"x-csrf-token\": library.csrfToken },\r\n      body: JSON.stringify({ action, extendHours: 168 }),\r\n    });\r\n    const body = (await response.json()) as { error?: string; replacement?: CreatedInvitation };\r\n    setBusy(false);\r\n    if (!response.ok) setError(body.error ?? \"Invitation action failed.\");\r\n    else {\r\n      if (body.replacement) setCreated([body.replacement]);\r\n      setNotice(\r\n        action === \"extend\"\r\n          ? `The invitation for ${invitation.recipientName} was extended.`\r\n          : action === \"replace\"\r\n            ? `A replacement invitation for ${invitation.recipientName} was created.`\r\n            : `The invitation for ${invitation.recipientName} was revoked.`,\r\n      );\r\n    }\r\n    await load();\r\n  }\r\n\r\n  if (!library && error)\r\n    return (\r\n      <main className=\"captain-library platform-loading\">\r\n        <ErrorState\r\n          title=\"Captain's Command could not be opened\"\r\n          detail={error}\r\n          action={{ label: \"Try Again\", onClick: () => void load() }}\r\n        />\r\n      </main>\r\n    );\r\n  if (!library)\r\n    return (\r\n      <main className=\"captain-library platform-loading\">\r\n        <LoadingState\r\n          title=\"Opening Captain's Command\"\r\n          detail=\"Loading voyages, invitations, and published editions.\"\r\n        />\r\n      </main>\r\n    );\r\n  const voyageGroups: Array<[string, Voyage[]]> = [\r\n    [\"Needs Attention\", library.groups.needsAttention],\r\n    [\"Active Voyages\", library.groups.activeVoyages],\r\n    [\"Ready to Launch\", library.groups.readyToLaunch],\r\n    [\"Completed Playthroughs\", library.groups.completedPlaythroughs],\r\n  ];\r\n  const voyageCount = voyageGroups.reduce((total, [, voyages]) => total + voyages.length, 0);\r\n  return (\r\n    <main className=\"captain-library\">\r\n      <header className=\"platform-header\">\r\n        <div>\r\n          <p className=\"eyebrow\">Operational command</p>\r\n          <h1>Captain&apos;s Tall Tale Library</h1>\r\n          <p>Run live voyages, invite Players, and keep authoring controls safely in Studio.</p>\r\n        </div>\r\n        <div>\r\n          <button\r\n            className=\"brass-button\"\r\n            onClick={() => {\r\n              setWizard(true);\r\n              setStep(0);\r\n            }}\r\n          >\r\n            Create a Voyage\r\n          </button>\r\n        </div>\r\n      </header>\r\n      <nav className=\"platform-tabs\" aria-label=\"Captain library sections\">\r\n        <button\r\n          className={tab === \"voyages\" ? \"active\" : \"\"}\r\n          aria-pressed={tab === \"voyages\"}\r\n          onClick={() => setTab(\"voyages\")}\r\n        >\r\n          Voyages\r\n        </button>\r\n        <button\r\n          className={tab === \"invitations\" ? \"active\" : \"\"}\r\n          aria-pressed={tab === \"invitations\"}\r\n          onClick={() => setTab(\"invitations\")}\r\n        >\r\n          Invitations{\" \"}\r\n          <span>\r\n            {library.invitations.filter((item) => [\"CREATED\", \"COPIED\", \"VIEWED\"].includes(item.status)).length}\r\n          </span>\r\n        </button>\r\n        <button\r\n          className={tab === \"published\" ? \"active\" : \"\"}\r\n          aria-pressed={tab === \"published\"}\r\n          onClick={() => setTab(\"published\")}\r\n        >\r\n          Published Tales\r\n        </button>\r\n      </nav>\r\n      {notice && <StatusBanner tone=\"success\">{notice}</StatusBanner>}\r\n      {error && <StatusBanner tone=\"danger\">{error}</StatusBanner>}\r\n      {tab === \"voyages\" && (\r\n        <div className=\"captain-groups\">\r\n          {!voyageCount && (\r\n            <EmptyState\r\n              title=\"No voyages need your attention\"\r\n              detail=\"Choose a published Tall Tale, configure the participants, and create secure invitations.\"\r\n              action={{\r\n                label: \"Create a Voyage\",\r\n                onClick: () => {\r\n                  setWizard(true);\r\n                  setStep(0);\r\n                },\r\n              }}\r\n            />\r\n          )}\r\n          {voyageGroups.map(\r\n            ([label, voyages]) =>\r\n              voyages.length > 0 && (\r\n                <section key={label}>\r\n                  <header>\r\n                    <h2>{label}</h2>\r\n                    <span>{voyages.length}</span>\r\n                  </header>\r\n                  <div className=\"captain-card-grid\">\r\n                    {voyages.map((voyage) => (\r\n                      <VoyageCard\r\n                        key={`${label}-${voyage.id}`}\r\n                        voyage={voyage}\r\n                        busy={busy}\r\n                        launch={() => void launch(voyage)}\r\n                      />\r\n                    ))}\r\n                  </div>\r\n                </section>\r\n              ),\r\n          )}\r\n        </div>\r\n      )}\r\n      {tab === \"invitations\" && (\r\n        <section className=\"invitation-dashboard\">\r\n          <header>\r\n            <div>\r\n              <p className=\"eyebrow\">Tracked security objects</p>\r\n              <h2>Invitation management</h2>\r\n            </div>\r\n          </header>\r\n          <div className=\"invitation-table\" role=\"table\">\r\n            {!library.invitations.length && (\r\n              <EmptyState\r\n                title=\"No invitations have been created\"\r\n                detail=\"Invitations appear here after a Captain creates a voyage for one or more Players.\"\r\n                action={{\r\n                  label: \"Create a Voyage\",\r\n                  onClick: () => {\r\n                    setWizard(true);\r\n                    setStep(0);\r\n                  },\r\n                }}\r\n              />\r\n            )}\r\n            {library.invitations.map((invitation) => (\r\n              <article key={invitation.id} role=\"row\">\r\n                <div>\r\n                  <strong>{invitation.recipientName}</strong>\r\n                  <span>\r\n                    {invitation.taleTitle} Â· {invitation.voyageName}\r\n                  </span>\r\n                </div>\r\n                <div>\r\n                  <b className={`status-pill status-${invitation.status.toLocaleLowerCase()}`}>{invitation.status}</b>\r\n                  <small>\r\n                    token {invitation.tokenPrefix}â€¦ Â· code {invitation.shortCodePrefix}â€¦\r\n                  </small>\r\n                </div>\r\n                <div>\r\n                  <time>{new Date(invitation.expiresAt).toLocaleString()}</time>\r\n                  <small>\r\n                    {invitation.viewedAt ? `Viewed ${new Date(invitation.viewedAt).toLocaleString()}` : \"Not viewed\"}\r\n                  </small>\r\n                </div>\r\n                <div className=\"row-actions\">\r\n                  {[\"CREATED\", \"SENT\", \"COPIED\", \"VIEWED\"].includes(invitation.status) && (\r\n                    <>\r\n                      <button disabled={busy} onClick={() => void invitationAction(invitation, \"extend\")}>\r\n                        Extend\r\n                      </button>\r\n                      <button disabled={busy} onClick={() => void invitationAction(invitation, \"replace\")}>\r\n                        Replace invitation\r\n                      </button>\r\n                      <button\r\n                        className=\"button-danger\"\r\n                        disabled={busy}\r\n                        onClick={() => void invitationAction(invitation, \"revoke\")}\r\n                      >\r\n                        Revoke invitation\r\n                      </button>\r\n                    </>\r\n                  )}\r\n                </div>\r\n              </article>\r\n            ))}\r\n          </div>\r\n        </section>\r\n      )}\r\n      {tab === \"published\" && (\r\n        <section className=\"published-tale-grid\">\r\n          {!library.publishedTales.length && (\r\n            <EmptyState\r\n              title=\"No published Tall Tales are ready\"\r\n              detail=\"A Creator must validate and publish an edition before a Captain can create a voyage from it.\"\r\n              action={{ label: \"Open Tall Tale Studio\", href: \"/studio/library\" }}\r\n            />\r\n          )}\r\n          {library.publishedTales.map((tale) => (\r\n            <article key={tale.id}>\r\n              <p className=\"card-kicker\">{tale.visibility.toLocaleLowerCase()}</p>\r\n              <h2>{tale.title}</h2>\r\n              <p>{tale.subtitle}</p>\r\n              <ul>\r\n                {tale.versions.map((version) => (\r\n                  <li key={version.id}>\r\n                    <span>Version {version.label}</span>\r\n                    <small>\r\n                      {version.activeRunCount} runs Â· {new Date(version.publishedAt).toLocaleDateString()}\r\n                    </small>\r\n                  </li>\r\n                ))}\r\n              </ul>\r\n              <button\r\n                onClick={() => {\r\n                  chooseTale(tale.id);\r\n                  setWizard(true);\r\n                  setStep(1);\r\n                }}\r\n              >\r\n                Invite Players\r\n              </button>\r\n              <Link href={`/captain/tales/${tale.id}`}>Open details</Link>\r\n            </article>\r\n          ))}\r\n        </section>\r\n      )}\r\n      {created.length > 0 && !wizard && <InvitationSecrets invitations={created} csrf={library.csrfToken} />}\r\n      {wizard && (\r\n        <VoyageWizard\r\n          step={step}\r\n          setStep={setStep}\r\n          close={() => setWizard(false)}\r\n          library={library}\r\n          taleId={taleId}\r\n          chooseTale={chooseTale}\r\n          versionId={versionId}\r\n          setVersionId={setVersionId}\r\n          selectedTale={selectedTale}\r\n          selectedVersion={selectedVersion}\r\n          voyageName={voyageName}\r\n          setVoyageName={setVoyageName}\r\n          captainMode={captainMode}\r\n          setCaptainMode={setCaptainMode}\r\n          hints={hints}\r\n          setHints={setHints}\r\n          sideQuests={sideQuests}\r\n          setSideQuests={setSideQuests}\r\n className=\"captain-voyage-card\">\r\n      <div className=\"session-signal\">\r\n        <i className={voyage.connected ? \"connected\" : \"quiet\"} />\r\n        <span>{voyage.connected ? \"Player recently connected\" : \"No recent heartbeat\"}</span>\r\n      </div>\r\n      <p className=\"card-kicker\">Version {voyage.versionLabel}</p>\r\n      <h3>{voyage.taleTitle}</h3>\r\n      <h4>{voyage.voyageName}</h4>\r\n      <dl>\r\n        <div>\r\n          <dt>Status</dt>\r\n          <dd>{voyage.status.toLocaleLowerCase()}</dd>\r\n        </div>\r\n        <div>\r\n          <dt>Players</dt>\r\n          <dd>\r\n            {voyage.players\r\n              .map((player) => `${player.displayName} (${player.status.toLocaleLowerCase()})`)\r\n              .join(\", \") || \"No Players\"}\r\n          </dd>\r\n        </div>\r\n        <div>\r\n          <dt>Last activity</dt>\r\n          <dd>{new Date(voyage.lastActivityAt).toLocaleTimeString()}</dd>\r\n        </div>\r\n        {voyage.pendingAction && (\r\n          <div>\r\n            <dt>Needs action</dt>\r\n            <dd>{voyage.pendingAction}</dd>\r\n          </div>\r\n        )}\r\n      </dl>\r\n      <div className=\"card-actions\">\r\n        <Link className=\"brass-button\" href={`/captain/sessions/${voyage.id}`}>\r\n          Open Captain console\r\n        </Link>\r\n        <Link href={`/captain/voyages/${voyage.id}/player-preview`}>Preview as Player</Link>\r\n        {[\"READY\", \"SCHEDULED\"].includes(voyage.status) && (\r\n          <button disabled={busy} onClick={launch}>\r\n            Launch voyage\r\n          </button>\r\n        )}\r\n      </div>\r\n    </article>\r\n  );\r\n}\r\n\r\ntype WizardProps = Record<string, unknown> & {\r\n  step: number;\r\n  setStep: (step: number) => void;\r\n  close: () => void;\r\n  library: Library;\r\n  taleId: string;\r\n  chooseTale: (id: string) => void;\r\n  versionId: string;\r\n  setVersionId: (id: current.map((crew) => (crew.key === key ? { ...crew, ...update } : crew)));\r\n\r\n  useEffect(() => {\r\n    closeRef.current = props.close;\r\n  }, [props.close]);\r\n\r\n  useEffect(() => {\r\n    const previous = document.activeElement as HTMLElement | null;\r\n    const dialog = dialogRef.current;\r\n    const focusable = () =>\r\n      Array.from(\r\n        dialog?.querySelectorAll<HTMLElement>(\r\n          'button:not([disabled]), a[href], input:not([disabled]), select:not([disabled]), textarea:not([disabled]), [tabindex]:not([tabindex=\"-1\"])',\r\n        ) ?? [],\r\n      );\r\n    focusable()[0]?.focus();\r\n    const keydown = (event: KeyboardEvent) => {\r\n      if (event.key === \"Escape\") {\r\n        event.preventDefault();\r\n        closeRef.current();\r\n        return;\r\n      }\r\n      if (event.key !== \"Tab\") return;\r\n      const controls = focusable();\r\n      if (!controls.length) return;\r\n      const first = controls[0];\r\n      const last = controls.at(-1)!;\r\n      if (event.shiftKey && document.activeElement === first) {\r\n        event.preventDefault();\r\n        last.focus();\r\n      } else if (!event.shiftKey && document.activeElement === last) {\r\n        event.preventDefault();\r\n        first.focus();\r\n      }\r\n    };\r\n    dialog?.addEventListener(\"keydown\", keydown);\r\n    return () => {\r\n      dialog?.removeEventListener(\"keydown\", keydown);\r\n      previous?.focus();\r\n    };\r\n  }, []);\r\n\r\n  return (\r\n    <div className=\"wizard-backdrop\"         <p className=\"eyebrow\">Step {props.step + 1} of 7</p>\r\n            <h2 id=\"wizard-title\">{steps[props.step]}</h2>\r\n          </div>\r\n          <button aria-label=\"Close invitation props.step ? \"step\" : undefined}\r\n              key={label}\r\n            >\r\n              <span>{index + 1}</span>\r\n              <small>{label}</small>\r\n            </li>\r\n          ))}\r\n        </ol>\r\n        <div className=\"wizard-body\">\r\n          {props.step === 0 && (\r\n            <div className=\"wizard-choice-grid\">\r\n fireEvent.change(screen.getByLabelText(\"Progress\"), { target: { value: \"IN_PROGRESS\" } });\n+    expect(screen.getByRole(\"heading\", { name: \"No Tall Tales match these filters\" })).toBeInTheDocument();\n+\n+    fireEvent.click(screen.getByRole(\"button\", { name: \"Clear Filters\" }));\n+    expect(screen.getByRole(\"heading\", { name: \"The Lantern Test\" })).toBeInTheDocument();\n+    expect(screen.getByRole(\"link\", { name: \"Resume Story\" })).toHaveAttribute(\n+      \"href\",\n+      \"/play/lantern-test/session/session-1\",\n+    );\n+  });\n+\n+  it(\"offers recovery after a connection failure\", async () => {\n+    const fetch = vi\n+      .fn()\n+      .mockRejectedValueOnce(new TypeError(\"offline\"))\n+      .mockResolvedValueOnce(jsonResponse({ tales: [tales[0]] }));\n+    vi.stubGlobal(\"fetch\", fetch);\n+    render(<TaleCatalog />);\n+\n+    expect(await screen.findByRole(\"alert\")).toHaveTextContent(\"could not be reached\");\n+    fireEvent.click(screen.getByRole(\"button\", { name: \"Try Again\" }));\n+\n+    await waitFor(() => expect(screen.getByRole(\"heading\", { name: \"The Lantern Test\" })).toBeInTheDocument());\n+    expect(fetch).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(2);\n+  });\n+});\n*** End Patch";
text(await tools.apply_patch(patch));
